title: PostHouse
description: Blog / Social media website made as a final project in the course Web Development II at Mittuniversitetet. The inspiration was to make a simpler version of Twitter and make use of newly learned PHP-skills.

title: Team PGZ
description: Website made while freelancing. The website presents a popular virtual racing team called Team PGZ.

title: Gotlands Vandrarhem
description: Website made as a final project in the university course, Web Design for CMS. The website presents a fictional hostel made for the project and is based on WordPress.

title: Färdtjänst
description: Website made as a final project in the university course Web Usability. The website acts as a design concept for a online booking system for a fictional transportation service and makes use of Gulp for an automated workflow.

title: Devpendent
description: Full-stack ASP.NET web application made as a place for developers to advertise themselves for freelance projects.

title: mpthree
description: Web application using React, Node.js, AWS S3 and MongoDB to store .mp3 files for playback by users.
